description: Upgrade plan to migrate PhotoAlbum-Java project to latest LTS versions

tasks.description: Upgrade to Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.4
tasks.reason: Migrating to the latest LTS versions of Java (21) and Spring Boot (3.4) ensures long-term support, improved performance, enhanced security patches, and access to modern language features. Spring Boot 3.x also requires Jakarta EE, replacing the deprecated javax.* namespace.
tasks.requirements: Upgrade JDK to 21, Spring Boot to 3.4, Spring Framework to 6.x, and migrate javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces where applicable. Update all related dependencies to versions compatible with Spring Boot 3.4 and Java 21.
